title: Citrusy Smoked Norwegian Ancho Chilli Pilaf
description: This dish is a unique blend of citrusy flavors from Norway and the smokiness of ancho chillies. It's perfect for a crowd-pleasing meal that's easy to make and Buddhist-temple-friendly.

ingredients.name: Sesame oil
ingredients.notes: Use a good quality oil with a high smoke point.

ingredients.name: Smoked paprika
ingredients.notes: Smoked paprika adds a nice smoky flavor.

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Use a flaky sea salt for best results.

ingredients.name: Banana leaves
ingredients.notes: Use fresh banana leaves for the best flavor and texture.

ingredients.name: Cilantro
ingredients.notes: Chopped cilantro adds a nice fresh flavor.

ingredients.name: Ginger
ingredients.notes: Grated ginger adds a nice spice.

ingredients.name: Garlic
ingredients.notes: Mince the garlic and saut69 for best results.

ingredients.name: Green onions
ingredients.notes: Chopped green onions add a nice crunch.

instructions: Heat the sesame oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
